import json, glob, os

files = sorted\(glob.glob\('*__filtering_summary.json'\)\)
print\(f'Total files: {len\(files\)}'\)
print\(\)

for f in files:
    with open\(f\) as fh:
        d = json.load\(fh\)
    
    run_id = f.replace\('__filtering_summary.json',''\)
    # Determine protocol
    protocol = 'P2' if '_P2_' in run_id else 'P1' if '_P1_' in run_id else 'P3'
    timepoint = 'T1' if '_T1_' in run_id else 'T2' if '_T2_' in run_id else 'T3'
    
    # Extract PSD fields
    psd = d.get\('psd_validation', d.get\('filter_psd_validation', {}\)\)
    dance_delta = psd.get\('dance_band_delta_db', psd.get\('dance_delta_db', 'MISSING'\)\)
    noise_delta = psd.get\('noise_band_delta_db', psd.get\('noise_delta_db', 'MISSING'\)\)
    verdict = psd.get\('verdict', psd.get\('status', 'MISSING'\)\)
    dance_pct = psd.get\('dance_band_preservation_pct', 'MISSING'\)
    noise_pct = psd.get\('noise_band_attenuation_pct', 'MISSING'\)
    n_flags = psd.get\('n_flagged_columns', 'MISSING'\)
    
    # Stage counts
    stage1 = d.get\('stage1_artifacts', d.get\('artifacts_flagged', 'MISSING'\)\)
    stage2 = d.get\('stage2_outliers', d.get\('hampel_outliers', 'MISSING'\)\)
    
    # Winter cutoffs
    cutoffs = d.get\('per_joint_cutoffs', d.get\('joint_cutoffs', {}\)\)
    if isinstance\(cutoffs, dict\) and cutoffs:
        vals = list\(cutoffs.values\(\)\)
        cutoff_mean = sum\(vals\)/len\(vals\) if vals else 'MISSING'
        cutoff_min = min\(vals\) if vals else 'MISSING'
        cutoff_max = max\(vals\) if vals else 'MISSING'
    else:
        cutoff_mean = cutoff_min = cutoff_max = 'MISSING'
    
    print\(f'--- {protocol} {timepoint} | {run_id[:40]}...'\)
    print\(f'    dance_delta_dB: {dance_delta}  |  noise_delta_dB: {noise_delta}'\)
    print\(f'    dance_pct: {dance_pct}  |  noise_pct: {noise_pct}'\)
    print\(f'    n_flagged_cols: {n_flags}  |  verdict: {verdict}'\)
    print\(f'    stage1_artifacts: {stage1}  |  stage2_outliers: {stage2}'\)
    print\(f'    winter_cutoff: min={cutoff_min} mean={cutoff_mean:.2f} max={cutoff_max}' if isinstance\(cutoff_mean, float\) else f'    winter_cutoff: {cutoff_mean}'\)
    print\(\)
")

Bash(cd "/Users/drorhazan/Desktop/gaga_pipeline_audit/gaga_pipeline_audit/derivatives/step_04_filtering" && python3 -c "
import json, glob

files = sorted\(glob.glob\('*__filtering_summary.json'\)\)

rows = []
for f in files:
    with open\(f\) as fh:
        d = json.load\(fh\)
    run_id = f.replace\('__filtering_summary.json',''\)
    protocol = 'P2' if '_P2_' in run_id else \('P1' if '_P1_' in run_id else 'P3'\)
    timepoint = 'T1' if '_T1_' in run_id else \('T2' if '_T2_' in run_id else 'T3'\)
    
    fp = d.get\('filter_params', {}\)
    psd = fp.get\('psd_audit', {}\)
    
    dance_mean = psd.get\('mean_dance_delta_dB', 'MISSING'\)
    noise_mean = psd.get\('mean_noise_attenuation_dB', 'MISSING'\)
    verdict = psd.get\('session_psd_verdict', 'MISSING'\)
    n_over = psd.get\('n_oversmoothing', 'MISSING'\)
    n_noise_res = psd.get\('n_noise_residual', 'MISSING'\)
    worst_col = psd.get\('worst_column', 'MISSING'\)
    worst_dB = psd.get\('worst_dance_loss_dB', 'MISSING'\)
    
    stage1 = fp.get\('total_artifact_frames', 'MISSING'\)
    stage1_pct = fp.get\('artifact_frames_pct', 'MISSING'\)
    vel_spikes = fp.get\('total_velocity_spikes', 'MISSING'\)
    zscore_spikes = fp.get\('total_zscore_spikes', 'MISSING'\)
    stage2 = fp.get\('total_hampel_outliers', 'MISSING'\)
    stage2_pct = fp.get\('hampel_frames_pct', 'MISSING'\)
    
    wcs = fp.get\('winter_cutoff_stats', {}\)
    w_min = wcs.get\('min','?'\)
    w_max = wcs.get\('max','?'\)
    w_mean = wcs.get\('mean','?'\)
    w_std  = wcs.get\('std','?'\)
    
    snr = d.get\('snr_analysis', {}\)
    mean_snr = snr.get\('mean_snr_db', 'MISSING'\)
    snr_status = snr.get\('overall_status', 'MISSING'\)
    
    rows.append\({
        'run': run_id[:45],
        'proto': protocol,
        'tp': timepoint,
        'dance_mean': dance_mean,
        'noise_mean': noise_mean,
        'verdict': verdict,
        'n_over': n_over,
        'n_noise_res': n_noise_res,
        'worst_col': worst_col,
        'worst_dB': worst_dB,
        'stage1': stage1,
        'stage1_pct': stage1_pct,
        'vel_sp': vel_spikes,
        'zscore_sp': zscore_spikes,
        'stage2': stage2,
        'stage2_pct': stage2_pct,
        'w_min': w_min,
        'w_max': w_max,
        'w_mean': round\(w_mean,2\) if isinstance\(w_mean, float\) else w_mean,
        'w_std': round\(w_std,2\) if isinstance\(w_std, float\) else w_std,
        'mean_snr': mean_snr,
        'snr_status': snr_status
    }\)

print\('=== SESSION-LEVEL PSD SUMMARY ==='\)
print\(f'{\\"Session\\":<10} {\\"Dance Δ \(mean dB\)\\":>18} {\\"Noise Att \(mean dB\)\\":>20} {\\"Verdict\\":<30} {\\"N_over/57\\":>10} {\\"Worst col\\":<20} {\\"Worst dB\\":>10}'\)
print\('-'*130\)
for r in rows:
    tag = f\\"{r['proto']} {r['tp']}\\"
    print\(f'{tag:<10} {str\(r[\\"dance_mean\\"]\):>18} {str\(r[\\"noise_mean\\"]\):>20} {str\(r[\\"verdict\\"]\):<30} {str\(r[\\"n_over\\"]\)+\\"/57\\":>10} {str\(r[\\"worst_col\\"]\):<20} {str\(r[\\"worst_dB\\"]\):>10}'\)

print\(\)
print\('=== STAGE 1+2 ARTIFACT COUNTS ==='\)
print\(f'{\\"Session\\":<10} {\\"Stage1 frames\\":>14} {\\"Stage1 %\\":>10} {\\"Vel spikes\\":>11} {\\"Z-score spikes\\":>15} {\\"Stage2 outliers\\":>16} {\\"Stage2 %\\":>10}'\)
print\('-'*95\)
for r in rows:
    tag = f\\"{r['proto']} {r['tp']}\\"
    print\(f'{tag:<10} {str\(r[\\"stage1\\"]\):>14} {str\(r[\\"stage1_pct\\"]\):>10} {str\(r[\\"vel_sp\\"]\):>11} {str\(r[\\"zscore_sp\\"]\):>15} {str\(r[\\"stage2\\"]\):>16} {str\(r[\\"stage2_pct\\"]\):>10}'\)

print\(\)
print\('=== WINTER CUTOFF STATS ==='\)
print\(f'{\\"Session\\":<10} {\\"min Hz\\":>8} {\\"max Hz\\":>8} {\\"mean Hz\\":>10} {\\"std Hz\\":>8} {\\"SNR \(dB\)\\":>10} {\\"SNR status\\":>12}'\)
print\('-'*70\)
for r in rows:
    tag = f\\"{r['proto']} {r['tp']}\\"
    print\(f'{tag:<10} {str\(r[\\"w_min\\"]\):>8} {str\(r[\\"w_max\\"]\):>8} {str\(r[\\"w_mean\\"]\):>10} {str\(r[\\"w_std\\"]\):>8} {str\(r[\\"mean_snr\\"]\):>10} {str\(r[\\"snr_status\\"]\):>12}'\)

print\(\)
print\('P2-only dance band deltas:'\)
p2_dance = [r['dance_mean'] for r in rows if r['proto']=='P2' and isinstance\(r['dance_mean'], \(int,float\)\)]
if p2_dance:
    print\(f'  Values: {p2_dance}'\)
    print\(f'  Mean: {sum\(p2_dance\)/len\(p2_dance\):.3f} dB'\)
    print\(f'  Min:  {min\(p2_dance\):.3f} dB'\)
    print\(f'  Max:  {max\(p2_dance\):.3f} dB'\)
"

import json

# Get per-column breakdown for reference session + check gap guard details
with open\('671_T3_P2_R1_Take 2026-02-03 08.05.01 PM_001__filtering_summary.json'\) as f:
    d = json.load\(f\)

fp = d['filter_params']
psd = fp['psd_audit']

# Per-column grouped by body region
per_col = psd.get\('per_column', {}\)
region_map = {
    'Hips': 'trunk', 'Spine': 'trunk', 'Spine1': 'trunk',
    'Neck': 'head', 'Head': 'head',
    'RightShoulder': 'upper_prox', 'LeftShoulder': 'upper_prox',
    'RightArm': 'upper_prox', 'LeftArm': 'upper_prox',
    'RightForeArm': 'upper_dist', 'LeftForeArm': 'upper_dist',
    'RightHand': 'upper_dist', 'LeftHand': 'upper_dist',
    'RightUpLeg': 'lower_prox', 'LeftUpLeg': 'lower_prox',
    'RightLeg': 'lower_dist', 'LeftLeg': 'lower_dist',
    'RightFoot': 'lower_dist', 'LeftFoot': 'lower_dist',
}

# Compute per-region mean dance delta
from collections import defaultdict
region_deltas = defaultdict\(list\)
region_max_loss = defaultdict\(list\)
for col, stats in per_col.items\(\):
    joint = col.split\('__'\)[0]
    region = region_map.get\(joint, 'other'\)
    d_delta = stats.get\('dance_band_delta_dB'\)
    d_max = stats.get\('max_dance_band_loss_dB'\)
    if d_delta is not None:
        region_deltas[region].append\(d_delta\)
    if d_max is not None:
        region_max_loss[region].append\(d_max\)

print\('=== PER-REGION DANCE BAND ANALYSIS \(Reference: 671_T3_P2_R1\) ==='\)
print\(f'{\\"Region\\":<15} {\\"FC \(Hz\)\\":>8} {\\"Mean Δ \(dB\)\\":>12} {\\"Max single-freq loss\\":>22} {\\"n cols\\":>7}'\)
print\('-'*70\)
region_fc = {'trunk': 6.0, 'head': 8.0, 'upper_prox': 8.0, 'upper_dist': 12.0, 'lower_prox': 8.0, 'lower_dist': 10.2}
for region in ['trunk', 'head', 'upper_prox', 'upper_dist', 'lower_prox', 'lower_dist']:
    deltas = region_deltas[region]
    maxes = region_max_loss[region]
    if deltas:
        mean_d = sum\(deltas\)/len\(deltas\)
        mean_max = sum\(maxes\)/len\(maxes\) if maxes else float\('nan'\)
        fc = region_fc.get\(region, '?'\)
        print\(f'{region:<15} {str\(fc\):>8} {mean_d:>12.2f} {mean_max:>22.2f} {len\(deltas\):>7}'\)

print\(\)
# Gap guard details
gg = fp.get\('stage1_gap_guard', {}\)
print\('=== STAGE 1 GAP GUARD \(Reference session\) ==='\)
print\(f'  max_gap_across_all_cols: {gg.get\(\\"max_gap_across_all_cols\\"\)} frames'\)
print\(f'  total_unreliable_gaps:   {gg.get\(\\"total_unreliable_gaps\\"\)}'\)
print\(f'  cols_with_unreliable_gaps: {gg.get\(\\"cols_with_unreliable_gaps\\"\)}'\)

# Method distribution
print\(\)
print\('=== WINTER METHOD DISTRIBUTION ==='\)
method_dist = fp.get\('method_distribution', {}\)
for k, v in method_dist.items\(\):
    print\(f'  {k}: {v}'\)
")

Bash(cd "/Users/drorhazan/Desktop/gaga_pipeline_audit/gaga_pipeline_audit/derivatives/step_04_filtering" && python3 -c "
import json, glob

# Per-session per-region dance delta analysis
files = sorted\(glob.glob\('*__filtering_summary.json'\)\)

# Also need worst/best per column across all sessions to confirm the PSD verdict mechanism
print\('=== ALL SESSIONS: Per-column dance_band_delta ranges ==='\)
all_sessions_col_data = {}
for f in files:
    with open\(f\) as fh:
        d = json.load\(fh\)
    run_id = f.replace\('__filtering_summary.json',''\)
    proto = 'P2' if '_P2_' in run_id else \('P1' if '_P1_' in run_id else 'P3'\)
    tp = 'T1' if '_T1_' in run_id else \('T2' if '_T2_' in run_id else 'T3'\)
    tag = f'{proto} {tp}'
    
    fp = d['filter_params']
    psd = fp.get\('psd_audit', {}\)
    per_col = psd.get\('per_column', {}\)
    
    # Group by joint \(not axis\)
    joint_data = {}
    for col, stats in per_col.items\(\):
        joint = col.split\('__'\)[0]
        dv = stats.get\('dance_band_delta_dB', 0\)
        if joint not in joint_data:
            joint_data[joint] = []
        joint_data[joint].append\(dv\)
    
    # Print per-joint mean dance delta for this session
    print\(f'  {tag}: ', end=''\)
    trunks = []
    for j in ['Hips','Spine','Spine1']:
        if j in joint_data:
            trunks.append\(sum\(joint_data[j]\)/len\(joint_data[j]\)\)
    hands = []
    for j in ['LeftHand','RightHand']:
        if j in joint_data:
            hands.append\(sum\(joint_data[j]\)/len\(joint_data[j]\)\)
    if trunks:
        print\(f'Trunk avg={sum\(trunks\)/len\(trunks\):.2f} dB  ', end=''\)
    if hands:
        print\(f'Hands avg={sum\(hands\)/len\(hands\):.2f} dB'\)
    else:
        print\(\)

# Also check if the PSD threshold is per mean or per max
print\(\)
print\('=== PSD VERDICT MECHANISM CHECK \(reference session\) ==='\)
with open\('671_T3_P2_R1_Take 2026-02-03 08.05.01 PM_001__filtering_summary.json'\) as f:
    d = json.load\(f\)
fp = d['filter_params']
psd = fp['psd_audit']
per_col = psd.get\('per_column', {}\)

# Count: columns where mean dance_delta > -3 dB but verdict is still REVIEW
passing_mean_but_flagged = []
for col, stats in per_col.items\(\):
    v = stats.get\('psd_verdict', ''\)
    delta = stats.get\('dance_band_delta_dB', 0\)
    max_l = stats.get\('max_dance_band_loss_dB', 0\)
    if v == 'REVIEW_OVERSMOOTHING' and delta > -3.0:
        passing_mean_but_flagged.append\(\(col, delta, max_l\)\)

print\(f'Columns where mean_dance_delta > -3 dB but still REVIEW_OVERSMOOTHING: {len\(passing_mean_but_flagged\)}'\)
for col, delta, max_l in passing_mean_but_flagged:
    print\(f'  {col}: mean_delta={delta:.2f} dB, max_loss={max_l:.2f} dB'\)
")

import json

sessions = [
    '651_T1_P2_R1_Take 2026-01-15 04.35.25 PM_002',
    '651_T1_P2_R2_Take 2026-01-15 04.35.25 PM_005',
    '651_T2_P2_R1_Take 2026-01-26 05.24.12 PM_000',
    '651_T2_P2_R2_Take 2026-01-26 05.24.12 PM_003',
    '651_T3_P2_R1_2026-02-11 05.50.42 PM_2027',
    '651_T3_P2_R2_2026-02-11 05.50.42 PM_2030',
]

print\('=== STEP 02: preprocess summaries ==='\)
for s in sessions:
    f = f'derivatives/step_02_preprocess/{s}__preprocess_summary.json'
    d = json.load\(open\(f\)\)
    gate = d.get\('gate_02_status'\)
    bone = d.get\('bone_qc_status'\)
    mean_cv = d.get\('mean_cv'\)
    alerts = d.get\('bone_qc_alerts', []\)
    method_pos = d.get\('interpolation_method_positions'\)
    method_rot = d.get\('interpolation_method_rotations'\)
    # count total frames fixed
    pj = d.get\('per_joint', {}\)
    total_fixed = sum\(v.get\('frames_fixed_count',0\) for v in pj.values\(\)\)
    total_detected = sum\(v.get\('frames_detected_count',0\) for v in pj.values\(\)\)
    print\(f'{s[-20:]}: gate={gate}, bone_qc={bone}, mean_cv={mean_cv}, alerts={alerts}, total_fixed={total_fixed}, total_detected={total_detected}, method_pos={method_pos}, method_rot={method_rot}'\)
")

Bash(python3 -c "
import json

sessions = [
    '651_T1_P2_R1_Take 2026-01-15 04.35.25 PM_002',
    '651_T1_P2_R2_Take 2026-01-15 04.35.25 PM_005',
    '651_T2_P2_R1_Take 2026-01-26 05.24.12 PM_000',
    '651_T2_P2_R2_Take 2026-01-26 05.24.12 PM_003',
    '651_T3_P2_R1_2026-02-11 05.50.42 PM_2027',
    '651_T3_P2_R2_2026-02-11 05.50.42 PM_2030',
]

print\('=== STEP 04: filtering summaries ==='\)
for s in sessions:
    f = f'derivatives/step_04_filtering/{s}__filtering_summary.json'
    d = json.load\(open\(f\)\)
    fp = d.get\('filter_params', {}\)
    rq = d.get\('raw_quality', {}\)
    snr = d.get\('snr_analysis', {}\)
    cg = fp.get\('chunking_guard', {}\)
    ws = fp.get\('winter_cutoff_stats', fp.get\('winter_stats', {}\)\)
    
    # PSD verdicts
    psd = d.get\('psd_validation', {}\)
    if not psd:
        psd = d.get\('per_column_psd', {}\)
    n_review = 0
    n_pass = 0
    mean_dance = None
    for col_name, col_data in psd.items\(\) if isinstance\(psd, dict\) else []:
        v = col_data.get\('verdict', ''\) if isinstance\(col_data, dict\) else ''
        if 'REVIEW' in v: n_review += 1
        if v == 'PASS': n_pass += 1
        dd = col_data.get\('dance_delta_dB'\) if isinstance\(col_data, dict\) else None
        if dd is not None and mean_dance is None:
            mean_dance = dd  # just note first
    
    # Try alternate paths
    psd_verdict_key = 'psd_column_verdicts' 
    per_col = fp.get\(psd_verdict_key, {}\)

    \('651_T1_P2_R2_Take 2026-01-15 04.35.25 PM_005', False\),

    \('651_T2_P2_R2_Take 2026-01-26 05.24.12 PM_003', True\),  # dead
    \('651_T3_P2_R1_2026-02-11 05.50.42 PM_2027', False\),
    \('651_T3_P2_R2_2026-02-11 05.50.42 PM_2030', False\),
]
print\('=== FRAME COUNT CHAIN \(S01 vs S04 vs S06\) ==='\)

    s04_f = json.load\(open\(f'derivatives/step_04_filtering/{s}__filtering_summary.json'\)\)
    f6_path = f'derivatives/step_06_kinematics/{s}__validation_report.json'

Bash(python3 -c "
import pandas as pd
import pyarrow.parquet as pq

path = 'derivatives/step_06_kinematics/671_T1_P2_R1_Take 2026-01-06 03.57.12 PM_002__kinematics_master.parquet'
df = pq.read_table\(path\).to_pandas\(\)

print\('=== NaN DENSITY ==='\)
nan_counts = df.isnull\(\).sum\(\)
total = len\(df\)
non_zero_nans = nan_counts[nan_counts > 0]
print\(f'Total columns: {len\(df.columns\)}  Columns with NaN: {len\(non_zero_nans\)}'\)
print\('NaN columns:'\)
for col, n in non_zero_nans.sort_values\(ascending=False\).items\(\):
    print\(f'  {col}: {n} \({100*n/total:.3f}%\)'\)

print\(\)
print\('=== FIRST 8 COLUMNS \(with names\) ==='\)
for c in list\(df.columns[:8]\):
    print\(f'  {c}: dtype={df[c].dtype}'\)
print\('...'\)
print\('=== SPECIAL COLUMNS ==='\)
specials = [c for c in df.columns if not '__' in c]
for c in specials:
    print\(f'  {c}: dtype={df[c].dtype}, first={df[c].iloc[0]:.4f} last={df[c].iloc[-1]:.4f}'\)

print\(\)
print\('=== BOOL COLUMNS SAMPLE ==='\)
bool_cols = [c for c in df.columns if df[c].dtype == bool]

path = 'derivatives/step_06_kinematics/671_T1_P2_R1_Take 2026-01-06 03.57.12 PM_002__kinematics_master.parquet'

for c in df.columns:

print\(\)

print\('QC-related columns:', qc_cols if qc_cols else '\(none found\)'\)

import pandas as pd
import pyarrow.parquet as pq
import numpy as np

path = 'derivatives/step_06_kinematics/671_T1_P2_R1_Take 2026-01-06 03.57.12 PM_002__kinematics_master.parquet'
df = pq.read_table\(path\).to_pandas\(\)

# Value ranges for key features
print\('=== VALUE RANGES \(representative features\) ==='\)
sample_feats = [
    'Hips__zeroed_rel_omega_mag', 'Hips__zeroed_rel_alpha_mag',
    'Hips__euler_x', 'Hips__euler_y', 'Hips__euler_z',
    'Hips__lin_rel_px', 'Hips__lin_rel_py', 'Hips__lin_rel_pz',
    'Hips__lin_vel_rel_mag', 'Hips__lin_acc_rel_mag',
    'Hips__raw_rel_qx', 'Hips__raw_rel_qw',
    'wbc_com_x', 'wbc_com_y', 'wbc_com_z',
    'time_s',
]
for f in sample_feats:
    if f in df.columns:
        col = df[f]
        print\(f'  {f}: min={col.min\(\):.4f}, max={col.max\(\):.4f}, mean={col.mean\(\):.4f}, std={col.std\(\):.4f}'\)

print\(\)
print\('=== IS_ARTIFACT SUMMARY \(True frames per joint\) ==='\)
art_cols = [c for c in df.columns if c.endswith\('__is_artifact'\)]
for c in art_cols:
    n = df[c].sum\(\)
    if n > 0:
        print\(f'  {c}: {n} frames \({100*n/len\(df\):.3f}%\)'\)
print\(f'Total joints with any artifact flag: {sum\(1 for c in art_cols if df[c].sum\(\) > 0\)}'\)
print\(\)
print\('=== IS_HAMPEL_OUTLIER SUMMARY ==='\)
hamp_cols = [c for c in df.columns if c.endswith\('__is_hampel_outlier'\)]
for c in hamp_cols:
    n = df[c].sum\(\)
    if n > 0:
        print\(f'  {c}: {n} frames \({100*n/len\(df\):.3f}%\)'\)
print\(f'Total joints with any Hampel flag: {sum\(1 for c in hamp_cols if df[c].sum\(\) > 0\)}'\)
" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(python3 -c "
import pyarrow.parquet as pq
import numpy as np

path = 'derivatives/step_06_kinematics/671_T1_P2_R1_Take 2026-01-06 03.57.12 PM_002__kinematics_master.parquet'
df = pq.read_table\(path\).to_pandas\(\)

# Check time_s for uniform spacing
t = df['time_s'].values
dt = np.diff\(t\)
print\('=== TIME_S ANALYSIS ==='\)
print\(f'Start: {t[0]:.6f}s  End: {t[-1]:.6f}s  n={len\(t\)}'\)
print\(f'dt: min={dt.min\(\):.6f}s  max={dt.max\(\):.6f}s  mean={dt.mean\(\):.6f}s  std={dt.std\(\):.8f}s'\)
print\(f'Expected dt at 120Hz: {1/120:.6f}s  Actual mean: {dt.mean\(\):.6f}s'\)

# Check if 0-indexed integer or time-based
print\(\)
print\('=== INDEX ANALYSIS ==='\)
idx = df.index
print\(f'Index type: {type\(idx\)}  dtype: {idx.dtype}  range: [{idx[0]}, {idx[-1]}]'\)
print\(f'Is contiguous integer: {list\(idx[:5]\)} == [0,1,2,3,4]? {list\(idx[:5]\) == [0,1,2,3,4]}'\)

# Memory footprint
print\(\)
print\('=== MEMORY FOOTPRINT ==='\)
mem = df.memory_usage\(deep=True\).sum\(\)
print\(f'In-memory size: {mem/1e6:.1f} MB  \({mem/\(16914*803\):.0f} bytes/cell\)'\)
print\(f'Parquet file size: ', end=''\)
import os
sz = os.path.getsize\(path\)
print\(f'{sz/1e6:.1f} MB  \(compression ratio: {mem/sz:.1f}x\)'\)

# Check wbc_com units \(mm vs m\)  
print\(\)
print\('=== COM POSITION UNITS \(guessing from magnitude\) ==='\)
for col in ['wbc_com_x','wbc_com_y','wbc_com_z']:
    print\(f'  {col}: range [{df[col].min\(\):.2f}, {df[col].max\(\):.2f}]'\)
print\('  lin_rel_px \(Hips\): range [{:.2f}, {:.2f}]'.format\(df['Hips__lin_rel_px'].min\(\), df['Hips__lin_rel_px'].max\(\)\)\)
" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(python3 -c "
import pyarrow.parquet as pq
import numpy as np

path = 'derivatives/step_06_kinematics/671_T1_P2_R1_Take 2026-01-06 03.57.12 PM_002__kinematics_master.parquet'
df = pq.read_table\(path\).to_pandas\(\)

# 1. Check non-root joint lin_rel_px to confirm position units
print\('=== NON-ROOT JOINT POSITIONS ==='\)
for joint in ['LeftHand', 'LeftForeArm', 'Head', 'LeftFoot']:
    px = df[f'{joint}__lin_rel_px']
    py = df[f'{joint}__lin_rel_py']
    pz = df[f'{joint}__lin_rel_pz']
    mag = np.sqrt\(px**2 + py**2 + pz**2\)
    print\(f'  {joint}: px=[{px.min\(\):.1f},{px.max\(\):.1f}], range_mm={mag.max\(\):.1f}'\)

# 2. Check parquet compression
import pyarrow.parquet as pq2
pf = pq2.read_table\(path\)
print\(\)
print\('=== PARQUET ENCODING ==='\)
# Get compression from metadata
meta = pf.schema.metadata
print\('Row groups:', pf.metadata.num_row_groups\)
print\('Row group 0 num_rows:', pf.metadata.row_group\(0\).num_rows\)

# 3. Hampel discrepancy check - sum of is_hampel_outlier
print\(\)
print\('=== HAMPEL OUTLIER CHECK ==='\)
hamp_total = sum\(df[c].sum\(\) for c in df.columns if 'is_hampel_outlier' in c\)
art_total = sum\(df[c].sum\(\) for c in df.columns if 'is_artifact' in c\)
print\(f'Total is_hampel_outlier True frames \(all joints\): {hamp_total}'\)
print\(f'Total is_artifact True frames \(all joints\): {art_total}'\)

# 4. Check for omega_mag asymmetry
print\(\)
print\('=== OMEGA_MAG ASYMMETRY ==='\)
raw_omega_mag = [c for c in df.columns if 'raw_rel_omega_mag' in c]
zeroed_omega_mag = [c for c in df.columns if 'zeroed_rel_omega_mag' in c]
print\(f'raw_rel_omega_mag cols: {len\(raw_omega_mag\)}'\)
print\(f'zeroed_rel_omega_mag cols: {len\(zeroed_omega_mag\)}'\)
raw_rotvec = [c for c in df.columns if 'raw_rel_rotvec' in c or 'raw_rel_rotmag' in c]
print\(f'raw_rel_rotvec/rotmag cols: {len\(raw_rotvec\)}'\)
" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(python3 -c "
import pyarrow.parquet as pq
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd

path = 'derivatives/step_06_kinematics/671_T1_P2_R1_Take 2026-01-06 03.57.12 PM_002__kinematics_master.parquet'
df = pq.read_table\(path\).to_pandas\(\)

# Hampel and omega_mag checks
hamp_total = sum\(df[c].sum\(\) for c in df.columns if 'is_hampel_outlier' in c\)
art_total = sum\(df[c].sum\(\) for c in df.columns if 'is_artifact' in c\)
raw_omega_mag = [c for c in df.columns if 'raw_rel_omega_mag' in c]
zeroed_omega_mag = [c for c in df.columns if 'zeroed_rel_omega_mag' in c]
raw_rotvec = [c for c in df.columns if 'raw_rel_rotvec' in c or 'raw_rel_rotmag' in c]

print\('Hampel True frames:', hamp_total\)
print\('Artifact True frames:', art_total\)
print\('raw_rel_omega_mag cols:', len\(raw_omega_mag\)\)
print\('zeroed_rel_omega_mag cols:', len\(zeroed_omega_mag\)\)
print\('raw_rel_rotvec/rotmag cols:', len\(raw_rotvec\)\)

# Position units - confirmed mm
print\(\)
print\('Position units: LeftHand range', df['LeftHand__lin_rel_px'].min\(\), 'to', df['LeftHand__lin_rel_px'].max\(\), '\(mm\)'\)

# Row groups
pf = pq.read_table\(path\)
print\('Row groups:', pf.metadata.num_row_groups\)
rg = pf.metadata.row_group\(0\)
print\('Row group total compressed size:', rg.total_byte_size, 'bytes'\)

# File-level column stats
print\(\)
print\('=== EULER GIMBAL ZONE ==='\)
for j in ['Hips', 'Spine', 'LeftShoulder', 'LeftArm']:
    ez = df[f'{j}__euler_z']
    near_limit = \(\(ez.abs\(\) > 170\)\).sum\(\)
    print\(f'  {j}__euler_z: near ±180° frames={near_limit} \({100*near_limit/len\(df\):.2f}%\)'\)
" 2>/dev/null)
